fields.title: CuratedMemory Effect service
fields.description:
Create extensions/tau/src/services/curated-memory.ts — the core Effect service.

Service shape (CuratedMemory extends ServiceMap.Service):
- reloadFrozenSnapshot: Effect<void, MemoryFileError> — read both files from disk, deduplicate, render prompt blocks, store in frozen ref
- getFrozenPromptBlock(): string — sync getter, returns pre-rendered prompt block (both memory + user sections concatenated, empty sections omitted)
- add(bucket, text): Effect<MutationResult, MemoryError> — append entry, check limit, reject duplicates
- replace(bucket, oldText, newText): Effect<MutationResult, MemoryError> — find entry by substring, replace
- remove(bucket, oldText): Effect<MutationResult, MemoryError> — find entry by substring, remove
- setup: Effect<void, never, Scope> — register pi hooks

Key implementation details:

1. STORAGE: ~/.pi/agent/tau/memories/MEMORY.md and USER.md. Add getTauMemoryDir() to src/shared/discovery.ts

2. FROZEN SNAPSHOT: Use Effect Ref. Load on setup, refresh on session_start/session_switch. getFrozenPromptBlock returns pre-rendered block (sync).

3. MUTATION PATH: Acquire cross-process file lock, re-read disk, apply mutation, atomic write (temp + rename). Use Effect Semaphore(1) for in-process serialization. Mutations do NOT update frozen snapshot.

4. FILE LOCKING: Cross-process advisory lock (.lock file) for multi-pi-instance safety.

5. ATOMIC WRITE: write temp file in same dir, then fs.rename.

6. CHAR LIMITS: memory=2200, user=1375.

7. HOOKS: session_start/session_switch -> reload. before_agent_start -> inject prompt block.

Wire into app.ts layer graph.

Create test/curated-memory-service.test.ts.

Reference: .reference/hermes-agent/tools/memory_tool.py (MemoryStore class)
fields.notes: Implemented CuratedMemory service with frozen snapshot reload hooks, lockfile + semaphore guarded mutations, atomic writes, app wiring, and service tests. Restored the missing memory format/error files in the actual checkout so the new service compiles and runs. npm run gate passes in extensions/tau/.
fields.close_reason: Implemented CuratedMemory service and app wiring; work already landed in 619d8f8.
